title: Onboarding - Eula page - License Agreement and Privacy Policy check box
scenario: EULA checkbox must be checked before Continue button becomes active during onboarding in Poly Studio Mobile app
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app for the first time.
2. On the EULA (End User License Agreement) screen, observe the License Agreement and Privacy Policy check box and the Continue button.
3. Tap Continue without checking the License Agreement and Privacy Policy check box.
4. Check the License Agreement and Privacy Policy check box — a checkmark should appear.
5. Observe the Continue button state after checking the box.
expected: The Continue button is disabled (inactive) when the License Agreement and Privacy Policy check box is unchecked. After checking the box, a checkmark appears and the Continue button becomes active (enabled). Tapping Continue proceeds to the next onboarding screen.
